name: Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF (BND)
description: Tracks the Bloomberg U.S. Aggregate Float Adjusted Index, providing broad exposure to U.S. investment-grade bonds

name: iShares 1-3 Year Treasury Bond ETF (SHY)
description: Tracks short-term U.S. Treasury bonds with 1-3 year maturities, offering high liquidity and low duration risk

name: Vanguard Short-Term Corporate Bond ETF (VCSH)
description: Invests in high-quality corporate bonds with 1-5 year maturities, providing slightly higher yield than Treasuries

name: Fidelity Government Money Market Fund (SPAXX)
description: Invests in U.S. government securities and repurchase agreements, providing capital preservation and liquidity

name: iShares TIPS Bond ETF (SCHP)
description: Tracks U.S. Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS) to provide inflation protection and real returns

name: Vanguard Balanced Index Fund (VBIAX)
description: 60% stocks/40% bonds allocation providing balanced growth and income with automatic rebalancing

name: Schwab Target Date 2060 Fund (SWYNX)
description: Age-appropriate diversified portfolio that automatically adjusts allocation as retirement approaches

name: Vanguard Total International Stock ETF (VTIAX)
description: Broad exposure to developed and emerging international markets outside the U.S. for global diversification

name: iShares Core S&P 500 ETF (IVV)
description: Tracks the S&P 500 index, providing exposure to 500 of the largest U.S. companies

name: Fidelity Total Market Index Fund (FZROX)
description: Zero-fee fund tracking the entire U.S. stock market from large-cap to small-cap companies

name: Vanguard Growth ETF (VUG)
description: Focuses on large-cap U.S. growth stocks with strong earnings potential and above-average growth rates

name: iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (EEM)
description: Exposure to large and mid-cap stocks in emerging market countries with higher growth potential

name: Vanguard Small-Cap ETF (VB)

name: Technology Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLK)

name: ARK Innovation ETF (ARKK)

name: Invesco QQQ Trust ETF (QQQ)

name: iShares Russell 2000 Growth ETF (IWO)

name: First Trust Cloud Computing ETF (SKYY)
